purpose: Allow the ecosystem management layer to complete or continue RC1 without manual validation steps.
required_workflow_note: Displayed without leading period for iOS compatibility. Canonical path begins with a leading period.
acceptance_criteria: RC1 validation workflow succeeds on main.
RELEASE_CANDIDATE.md reports no manual validation requirement.
GOAL_ACTIVATION.json declares no manual actions required.
next_system_action: Ecosystem management can consume the workflow result, retrieve the receipt artifact, and decide whether to publish or continue development under the same goal.
